narrative:
Canaan Township has 3,263 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.7 percentage points.
